ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictors" (
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictor */,
  "predictor_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictor (e.g., Fitbit Active Score) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the predictor */,
  "predictor_type" TEXT /* Type of predictor (e.g., physical activity, sleep quality) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the predictor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the predictor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the predictor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("predictor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_predictors" (
  "user_predictor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user predictor */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictor */,
  "data_points" INTEGER /* Number of data points for the predictor */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the data (e.g., Unverified, Verified) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user predictor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user predictor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_predictor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_predictors_predictor_id FOREIGN KEY ("predictor_id") REFERENCES predictors ("predictor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_predictors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_models" (
  "user_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "predictive_coefficient" REAL /* Predictive coefficient of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcome_rsd" (
  "outcome_rsd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome RSD */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictor */,
  "outcome_rsd" REAL /* Outcome RSD at baseline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome RSD was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome RSD was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_rsd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcome_rsd_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcome_rsd_predictor_id FOREIGN KEY ("predictor_id") REFERENCES predictors ("predictor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_data" (
  "device_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device */,
  "data" TEXT /* Device-specific data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_data" (
  "app_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "app_type" TEXT /* Type of app */,
  "data" TEXT /* App-specific data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the app data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the app data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualization" (
  "data_visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization */,
  "data" TEXT /* Visualization data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualization_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Personalized recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "progress_tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress tracking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress tracking data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress tracking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress tracking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* User feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictor_values" (
  "predictor_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each predictor value */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "predictor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictor */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the predictor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the predictor value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("predictor_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictor_values_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictor_values_predictor_id FOREIGN KEY ("predictor_id") REFERENCES predictors ("predictor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_values" (
  "model_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model value */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the model */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model value was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_values_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_values_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)
